creator: mtm@wubethiopia.com
text:
The problem with the suggestion is that rc.d/syscons is run late in the 
 boot process. You need to have your disks mounted before you can run 
 rc.d/syscons (which you can't obviously do if you have a geli encrypted 
 disk).So, the dependency is actually the reverse: syscons requires geli.
 
 Cheers.
 -- 
 Mike Makonnen       | GPG-KEY: http://people.freebsd.org/~mtm/mtm.asc
 mtm @ FreeBSD.Org   | AC7B 5672 2D11 F4D0 EBF8  5279 5359 2B82 7CD4 1F55
